title: Deep Learning Approaches for Fire and Smoke Detection: A Comparative Study of CNN and MLP
venue: International Conference on Electrical Engineering and Informatics
snippet: Fire poses significant threats to buildings through-out their design lifespan, endangering human safety, causing property damage, and resulting in financial losses. Conventional fire detectors, which are predominantly sensor-based, exhibit limitations in effectively detecting fire and smoke. Consequently, computer vision-based fire detectors are emerging as a viable solution to address the shortcomings of sensor-based systems.
